steps.title: Identify the structural context
steps.content: The key signal is “supported by massive sandstone pillars” — a physical, load-bearing relationship where architectural elements hold up a structure.

steps.title: Match the physical meaning
steps.content: ”Held up” is correct because it names the physical action pillars perform on a bridge—bearing its weight. The other three name emotional or intellectual support, or improvement, which don't apply to an architectural structure. That matches choice C — C is correct.
